reviews.review_title: It has potential It has potential
reviews.review_description: OK, I was harsh but there was no one online in the maps were very small, but it does have potential. The movement was crisp. I was just in a bad mood. Great game, but not enough things have to be a perfect game and guess it is still in early access.
This is my favorite game.The owner is nice the maps are nice and the community is the best.I love this game the best
